Question: Rahul filed a case in court number 1. Can Rahul appeal the order made against Rahul?

IRAC_Reasoning.Rule: When wrong and defendant residency span two court territories the plaintiff holds the sole election right.
IRAC_Reasoning.Application: The assault in Dhaka and residence in Chittagong place wrong and defendant in separate jurisdictions triggering Section 19 so the plaintiff may choose either court.

Because the assault occurred in Dhaka and the defendant lives in Chittagong the plaintiff can file in either location.
Cited Acts and Sections: The Code of Civil Procedure, 1908, Section 19
